content.stem: In this grid, what completes the pattern in the bottom right?
content.explanation: Looking across rows: size goes big to small. Looking down columns: shape stays the same, color goes blue to red. So bottom right needs small red triangle.

metadata.misconception_targeted: incomplete analysis of multiple changing attributes

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may correctly track size and shape but miss the color change pattern
Students may reverse the size pattern or confuse row and column rules
Students may focus on size and color but miss that shape must stay consistent in columns
